no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction explicitly states the exact fix: move MCP.ts to packages/cli/src/mcp/MCP.ts, change import in bin.ts to './mcp/MCP', change relative imports to '../../package.json' and '../platform/_lib/help', remove three specific PDP tools, add 'MCP' to keywords, create README.md. Alternative implementations that achieve the same goals (e.g., different README wording, different formatting, different ordering of tool removals) would all pass.
